output.title: Security Deposit Demand Letter: Get Your Refund Fast
output.meta_description: Free security deposit demand letter templates for every state. Learn how to write a letter to your landlord and recover your deposit before it's too late.
content_outline: The Real Reason Your Landlord Won't Return Your Security Deposit
How to Write a Security Deposit Demand Letter That Works in Your State
Next Steps: What to Do If Your Landlord Ignores Your Demand Letter
key_points: A professionally formatted security deposit demand letter creates legal documentation and leverages state-specific deadlines to pressure landlords into compliance.
Using a state-law-compliant template eliminates guesswork, covers all required legal elements, and significantly increases your chances of a full refund without going to court.
output.cta: Create Your Free Security Deposit Demand Letter in 2 Minutes
output.target_audience: US renters who have moved out within the last 30-60 days and have not received their security deposit refund, or tenants dealing with unfair deductions, unresponsive landlords, or missed state-mandated return deadlines.
